framework.name: NIST AI RMF Measure Function
framework.description: Prescribes what to measure and how to assess metric effectiveness, but specifies zero timelines for when measurement should begin post-deployment. The framework is deliberately timeline-agnostic — it says 'regularly' without defining cadence.
framework.raw_quote: Appropriateness of AI metrics and effectiveness of existing controls is regularly assessed and updated

source.title: Measure - AIRC - NIST AI Resource Center
